name: the review queue defaults to human-in-the-loop and stages nothing without --auto-accept
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-clean --tool eslint --prose 'Never use var.' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/review-queue.sh" --in d.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'staged=0' e.txt && echo human-in-the-loop 1>&2
